tweets.text:
Speculative Fever Reaches New Heights
“Two years ago, The Elliott Wave Theorist showed a measure of speculative vs. conservative investing using the ratio of the NASDAQ 100 stock index to the Dow Jones Utility Average. We thought the ratio was high at 23x. Now it’s at 27x.

It would be easy to dismiss this ratio as outmoded. After all, AI is the big thing, so who cares about utilities? But that is exactly the point. People thought essentially the same thing in March 2000, when the ratio was at 15. Nine years later, it was at 3.

The chart shows that the current ratio is nearly twice the level of the March 2000 peak. When it turns down, the decline should be no less dramatic than it was from 2000 to 2009 as investors shifted from mania-chasing to conservative investing.” -- From Elliott Wave International’s Elliott Wave Theorist, June 18, 2026 (https://t.co/uZq9UfQrUp)
@elliottwaveintl
tweets.full_text:
Speculative Fever Reaches New Heights
“Two years ago, The Elliott Wave Theorist showed a measure of speculative vs. conservative investing using the ratio of the NASDAQ 100 stock index to the Dow Jones Utility Average. We thought the ratio was high at 23x. Now it’s at 27x.

It would be easy to dismiss this ratio as outmoded. After all, AI is the big thing, so who cares about utilities? But that is exactly the point. People thought essentially the same thing in March 2000, when the ratio was at 15. Nine years later, it was at 3.

The chart shows that the current ratio is nearly twice the level of the March 2000 peak. When it turns down, the decline should be no less dramatic than it was from 2000 to 2009 as investors shifted from mania-chasing to conservative investing.” -- From Elliott Wave International’s Elliott Wave Theorist, June 18, 2026 (https://t.co/uZq9UfQrUp)
@elliottwaveintl

tweets.text:
Google's Q2: revenue +24%, Cloud +82%, operating income +30%. And for the first time ever, free cash flow went negative: –$5.9B.
Don't flinch. That's not a leak — it's a choice. 
CapEx more than doubled to $45B to build the AI infrastructure that's already driving 82% cloud growth. You don't get the second number without the first. $GOOG @michaellebowitz
